name: Disaster-Related Tax Payment Deferral

eligibility.description: Taxpayers located in federally declared disaster areas or affected by significant fires/military actions as defined under section 7508A.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Postpones the 'last date prescribed for payment' for notice and demand purposes during periods disregarded under section 7508A due to disasters, fires, or terroristic actions.
